special_mechanics.name: Character-Specific Flight (Ickis)
special_mechanics.description: Ickis can fly for a short time as a special ability

special_mechanics.name: High Reach (Oblina)
special_mechanics.description: Oblina can reach high ledges as a special ability

special_mechanics.name: Team Stacking
special_mechanics.description: Characters can stack on top of one another to reach items normally out of reach

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics and review commentary. GamePro review noted 'stiff controls' and 'choppy scrolling' as criticisms. No quantitative physics parameters documented in available sources.
